Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Activity by Activity: Activity Initiate Request Occurrence C001 WebPortal C002 WebPortal C003 BranchReception Context All represent the start of the process Difference The channel differs Online vs Walkin Decision Should this be renamed Check C001 Verify Documents twice C002 Call Customer twice C003 Verify Documents twice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Re-reading the Prompt The same activity names appear multiple times within a single case Strict Interpretation I need to focus on activities that repeat within a specific Case ID

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activity Verify Documents Case C001 1st Occurrence Initial check Agent checks identity documents 2nd Occurrence Re-check Agent re-checks documents now that ID scan is provided Case C003 1st Occurrence Physical verification 2nd Occurrence Re-verify docs after account adjustment Distinction Initial Verification vs Re-verification Secondary Verification

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activity Call Customer Case C002 1st Occurrence Outbound call to clarify account discrepancy Investigative Clarification 2nd Occurrence Follow-up call to confirm adjustments made Confirmation Closure Distinction Initial Clarification Call vs Follow-up Confirmation Call

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Wait looking closer Correction Self-Correction on Initiate Request Wait check C003 Call Customer Wait looking at C001 Verify Documents Wait one more check C001 Verify Documents x2 C002 Call Customer x2 C003 Verify Documents x2

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Proposed Names Verify Documents 1st Initial Document Verification 2nd Re-Verification of Documents Call Customer 1st Clarification Call 2nd Confirmation Call

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Refining the names To make the log cleaner use consistent naming conventions across cases for the same logical step even if the case ID is different provided the context is the same Initial check Initial Document Verification Follow-up check Re-Verification of Documents

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Did I identify recurring activities Yes Did I interpret meaning changes Yes Did I rename them Yes Did I present the revised log Yes Did I justify choices Yes Final check on Initiate Request Final Polish
